news.title: Traumhaftes Rhein-Panorama: Berühmte Bastei in Köln könnte wiedereröffnen - t-online – Köln
news.summary:
# Summary

The article discusses the potential reopening of the famous Bastei, a historic landmark in Cologne with stunning Rhine River views. This is notable for visitors because the Bastei has been closed and its return would restore access to one of Cologne's most iconic scenic viewpoints overlooking the river. The reopening would be significant for tourists and locals seeking this popular destination for its panoramic views.
